_description: Address encoding golden fixtures. The Necklace TS bech32m encoder/decoder MUST reproduce the REAL vectors exactly. Pearl is Taproot-only (witness v1, bech32m); legacy v0 addresses are rejected.

bip86._note: Address derivation path for the Schnorr key-path scope.

pqScope._note: Separate XMSS commitment scope. Purpose 222 (0xDE) matches OP_CHECKXMSSSIG. Used to derive the deterministic XMSS pubkey committed into the Taproot tapscript root. NOT used for signing in the MVP.

vectors.label: REAL test-vector (address_test.go)
vectors.name: taproot testnet p2tr (same program, different HRP)

vectors.label: REAL invalid-case (address_test.go) - legacy v0 must be rejected
vectors.name: legacy segwit v0 p2wpkh
vectors.reason: witness version 0 is not supported (Pearl rejects bech32 v0; requires bech32m v1+)

vectors.label: REAL invalid-case (address_test.go)
vectors.name: invalid taproot program length
vectors.reason: witness program must be 32 bytes for v1
